_note: Updated 2026-05-29 cycle AN overnight-triage. Critic participated tonight via the closing METRIC_INTEGRITY_PROTOCOL § 3.1 attestation AND a substantive independent verification. Tonight was a heartbeat-only cycle (FIQ + bug-reports inbox both ABSENT for the 74th consecutive cycle, verified by directory-absence checks not waved off), so the three § 3.1 concrete questions resolve N/A by absence: no bug-report diagnoses to scrutinize, no proposals to challenge, no FIQ grades to audit. Cycle AN had a genuine POSITIVE app-health movement (86.6 -> 87.1, A- holds) -- the inverse of cycle AM's negative A12 re-oscillation. On a positive-movement night the failure mode is SELF-CREDIT: the easy spin is 'the heartbeat improved app-health.' The critic guarded against that and demanded surfaced-vs-caused rigor regardless of sign. Independent verification performed: confirmed exactly ONE dimension moved by reading the app-health.json dimension block verbatim and comparing to cycle AM's recorded scores -- A11_testing 88 -> 92 (+4, still green) is the SOLE mover; the other 10 non-A12 dims held byte-identical (A1 80, A2 100, A3 98, A4 93, A5 88, A6 92, A7 100, A8_performance 83/green [cycle-AH gain still sustained], A9 95, A10 100); A12_operational HELD at 60/yellow (still the single attention_item; founder_attention empty). The critic then DEMANDED surfaced-vs-caused proof and got the STRONGEST possible form: `git diff --stat docs/reports/app-health.html` is EMPTY -- the regen output is byte-identical to the HEAD-committed app-health.html, so a concurrent post-commit-regen cron had ALREADY committed 87.1 (HEAD advanced 82940cae -> 20885626 across the AM->AN window); the heartbeat reproduced it idempotently and CONFIRMS rather than authors. The critic GROUNDED the A11 88->92 cause by demanding `git log`: two test commits in the AM->AN window -- 60d6e2cc (BL-001 par/yardage regression spec) + 4811880a (mobile-viewport collection repair) -- a real coverage gain from CONCURRENT ship work, NOT produced by this heartbeat. KEY HONESTY MOVE (inverse of AM's 'don't call the negative move a regression'): don't call the +0.5 a heartbeat WIN -- the credit belongs to the concurrent test ships, surfaced by an idempotent regen. A12 STATUS verified UNCHANGED: still yellow at 60 because the same two concurrent artifacts (.claude/state/emu-unified-2026-05-29.log + .pw-full-sweep.log) remain dirty in run-start `git status` -- the AL-predicted oscillation persists, re-settles green once they clear; the watcher skip-dirty is a safety feature working as designed; manufacturing a proposal = ship-count gaming per Rule 2. The critic confirmed the commit uses an explicit pathspec capturing ONLY this cycle's own files (engineer.json + critic.json + journal) and does NOT sweep the two concurrent dirty artifacts or the untracked critique-resume dir. The critic actively guarded AGAINST a false self-credit claim on a positive night, against waving off the persisting A12 yellow, AND against manufacturing busywork -- rather than rubber-stamping. Critic token counter at ~188k cumulative since last rest (threshold crossed at cycle AH; +~14k this cycle); status remains active and no rest triggered -- heartbeat-only critic load is genuinely light per-cycle. Critic attests cleanly: substantive heartbeat cycle, ship closes.
